function.message: Processed the next inbox note by running OCR-style frontmatter extraction on both requested documents, preserving each original note body beneath the new YAML frontmatter, then removed the processed inbox file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed required bootstrap (tree, AGENTS, context), read relevant nested AGENTS/workflows/schemas before edits, applied finance schema fields only from visible note data, preserved full original bodies verbatim below frontmatter, and deleted inbox item after successful completion.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox request in 00_inbox/000_next-task.md explicitly asked OCR workflow for two finance docs. Workflow/schema docs required adding YAML frontmatter to existing files and preserving bodies. Both target files were read, updated in place with required invoice/bill fields and line items derived from visible tables, and the processed inbox item was deleted as directed by inbox workflow.
